reviews.review_msg: Still not sure why I wasted good money to be taught by someone who should have never been allowed to teach in the first place. Never comes to a comprehensible point, wastes time on insignificant details at the expense of actually explaining what the concepts are or how to use them. A joke of a class, avoid Jorge at all costs. You have been warned.

This class was not organized and the prof couldn't explain the concepts well. Going to class is a waste of time so it's better to study on your own. The material is interesting and not hard to understand by reading the textbook or watching some youtube videos. His exams were not hard if you understood the material and cheat sheets are allowed.

The WORST prof I have ever had. Not only was he the most unclear prof ever, he was so disorganized and just made it seem like he had no idea himself what was going on. His notes, the worst. His lectures, the worst. No one ever even came to lecture because when you did, it was just confusing and he would just mumble and make mistakes. DONT RECOMMEND

shouldn't be teaching at all, heavy accents is not a problem but he can never finish one complete sentence, unclear at any time for anything- lectures, slides, solving questions during lecture, he can get confused by himself, delayed responding emails, unclear criteria. He was correcting final exams when there were 15 minutes left for the final.

If they let me give him a 0 rating, I would. He was disorganized without fail, his lectures never made sense, his practice material was inconsistent with what he taught, he wrote the final THE. NIGHT. BEFORE. OUR. 8:30AM. EXAM. He is more than just a bad prof - the department did nothing even with proof of how bad things were. #theydontcareaboutyou
He don't know how to teach stat. stat 305 should be an easy course, but the midterm 2 average was 50%. Don't take with him!!!!!
bad bad bad prof, this is my first semester and I have wanted to leave school because Jorge, don't take this course with any reason!!!!!!!!!!
He ran in late a pulled out a crumpled piece of paper to write notes on. He wrote the exam the night before and it was super unclear and had mistakes. DO NOT RECCOMEND.
Other comments says it all. Adding one point: his notes are the most unorganized I've ever seen.

To future students: I took SA257 in spring 2019. Theres no word in the world to describe this course. We formed a resistant group (around 30 students) and started emailing the chair. We weren't taken seriously until a couple students brought the issues to the dean. Jorge was eventually banned from teaching in the SA department. You can do it too!

I cannot fit into 350 characters how awful he was a professor. This class is honestly as safety hazard, attending made me want to yeet myself of the mountain. Had to teach myself the whole course using the textbook and khan academy. Anyways if you love yourself don't take stats with Jorge.<3

The worst prof ever, i could not understand anything in his lecture, 2/3 of students skip his lectures. His lecture notes are aweful too, he had data from R but did not tell how to get them, very unorganized. Just avoid him or he will ruin your grade

This prof doesn't do a good job; He avoids relevance in class and is very slow with going through course material. He has an accent few understand, which is especially challenging in a department that has a lot of challenging grammar. He forgot to mark my exam <2 days before the final and ended up giving me 15%, So feel free to get an audit.

Avoid at all cost. Inconsistently replies to emails, rude to students when you try to ask questions. Midterm average was 40%, nearly 2/3 of the class failed. Our class had to get the faculty head to sit in on one of our lectures to prove how bad Prof. Rodriguez is. Currently in the process of working with the Uni Ombudsman to try to fix this mess.

Takes him forever to reply to emails (especially when it's about an exam). He never listens to his students' suggestions. He posted the study guide for M2 a few days before the exam. M2 didn't involve probability but his guide had half probability q's (said he didn't want to revise the doc & essentially was too lazy to make up relevant questions).

Not a good prof at all. Horrible teaching, isn't accessible at all, seems to not care for his students. Doesn't post notes until minutes before class, doesn't post assignments until they're due in less than a week, and often selectively replies emails. His exams and assignments are poorly worded. DO NOT TAKE STATS WITH HIM!

Absolutely horrendous teaching quality and style. I don't understand why any school would hire him as an educator as he clearly has zero clue what he is doing in an educational setting. Makes typos on all lecture notes and assignment questions. Exam irrelevant to materials. One of the worst profs I've encountered in 4+ years. Just no.

Don't. My advice: grab onto the nearest backpack and naruto run your way out of making this bad decision. He's awful. I used to be sane before taking his class. Gives awful lectures; very irrelevant tests compared to the questions done in class. Designed an exam where almost every student left the last two pages (20 marks) blank due to time limit.
I have no clue what he is talking about in class. He is very unorganized and his exams are not even relevant to his lecture notes. Never try to take his class. Run away please.

Jorge has been the worst professor I have ever had in my 4 years of university. He seems like a nice guy, but teaching isn't for everyone. He doesn't know how to convey course material clearly, he's very disorganized, always leaves the class wondering what's going on, and his exams and assignments are very confusing. Avoid if you can.
Please don't do this to yourself Take literally any other prof's class
Do not take his course he is horrible. Very unorganized and honestly quite rude. Truly my least favourite course I've ever taken.

The other reviews say it all. Completely disorganized, I've been teaching myself through the textbook and still don't know what to expect from Jorge. Lectures teach little to nothing, refuses to answer any and all questions in class. Very little clarity. Avoid at all cost, quite literally the worst class I've had to endure.
Not even being dramatic, this was the worst experience of my life.

Run fast. Run far. Showed up 40 min late to class because he "forgot" the time it started. Most disorganized class ever with minimal direction on what to study/what you're being tested on. Seems confused by any questions about .. anything. Poor quality of instruction and super vague about everything. Don't make the same mistake I did. Please. Run.
Quite possibly the worst teacher Ive ever encountered. So disorganized, makes no attempt at teaching from the basics onward. Completely confusing. DO NOT TAKE THIS MANS CLASSES. Hes a hack.
I had so many breakdowns because of this class. Never in my life did I have a prof this unorganized and unprepared. AVOID THIS PROF. Some people are just not meant to teach.
A truly disturbing experience.

Probably the worst class I've ever had the misfortune to take. His lectures and assignments make no sense and are so disorganized. He often inserts terms in these assignments that he's never covered and makes it out to be that we just haven't paid attention in class. I think I understand less about stats now than I did before I took this class.
You will never know what he is talking about in lecture. No good resources used for studying. Releases assignments 4 days before it is due.

Unless you feel like being completely infuriated, stressed, and helpless for an entire semester, stay away. Jorge is unorganized, frequently changes due dates, and is overall just incredibly unapproachable. No lecture slides and his lectures jump around so much it is almost impossible to know what he is talking about.
The worst professor I have ever encountered. You don't understand. Stay away.

Honestly the worst class I have ever taken. Completely refused to answer questions because after one (very confusing) lecture should be enough to understand really difficult material. He is all over the place and has no structure in his lectures at all. The whole class is worried about failing for his lack of teaching, just happy to have a good TA.

No tags fit this prof. Jorge has difficulty explaining course material, is often all over the place in lectures (which I'm pretty sure are not prepared in advance). Exams, good luck. Doesn't provide ample material to ensure success of students in his class or their academic future. Avoid like the plague if able. Sadly, SA257 mandatory.
Do not take a class with this prof. He is a nice guy but cannot teach. This will be the most difficult class you take with no help. You will be teaching yourself the entire course. Avoid if possible.
worst instructor ever.

there are no notes, lectures aren't organized, he's all over the place and is extremely hard to follow. He is not helpful and has this air about him where he really doesn't seem to understand how awful of a teacher he is. I would seriously recommend not taking him. I've learned nothing from him - everything has been from the TA or self-taught.
lecture note are unorganized, not easy for searching

Very confusing, unable to answer questions about the worksheets he assigns and cannot explain how to do certain questions. Asked him for help and he read the question to me and just walked away. He would explain a concept and half way through realize he taught it wrong, he'd try again and say "I think that's how to do it". DO NOT TAKE HIS CLASS!

Jorge was extremely difficult to follow. He often came to class not having the materials needed. He gave little to no breaks, and did not have a clear outline for his lectures and tended to jump around all over the place. This course is tough because most students are Arts students and have little experience with SPSS so it was mostly self-taught

I feel attendance is not mandatory but if u miss a class u wouldn't know how to use SPSS. His assignments are very vague and difficult to understand. His midterm is based on SPSS, so memorize that program!! You were allowed to bring in a cheat sheet for the midterm but it didnt help. I also don't recommend emailing him, ask him in person. good luck

No dates on Syllabus. Doesn't respond to E-Mails. Came to class after missing a class and suddenly we had a quiz. Doesn't know how to teach. Spends the whole lecture jumping from topic to topic. I'm dropping his class and I have learned absolutely nothing aside from what I taught myself outside of class.
The worst prof ever. Seriously, my advice to anyone who wants to take Stat100, avoid him.  Not joking
Can't teach.
Lol the class average on the last test was 42%. That's all I have to say.

He's a nice guy but does a terrible job at communicating the material to the class. Hard to understand what he's saying because of his accent. Also he asks bonus questions on exams about random things he's mentioned in class. Might as well learn from the lecture notestextbook by yourself because there was really no point in attending class.

Jorge definitely does not know how to teach. During lecture, he uses phrases like "I think..." "... I guess" when explaining because he copies the notes. When a student asks a question, I believe most of the time he confuses the students more than they were. A lot of equations are expected to be memorized for the exam. Avoid him if you can.
Jorge does not teach. Jorge does not try to teach. Jorge is not organized. Jorge read previous prof notes and Jorge copy down. Jorge give easy exam but no teach so easy exam  hard exam.

Easily the worst prof I have ever had. Zero understanding towards students and zero teaching ability, all he does in class is copy the examples from the textbook. No wonder the class average for the last 2 midterms were below 50%. NEVER TAKE HIS CLASS.

I agree that the lectures are confusing :s I don't get much out of class. I pretty much just learn from the textbook and try to do lots of the questions. The workshop TAs are usually helpful and a couple are pretty cute too :)  If possible I would recommend taking this class with a different prof.
Unable to teach things in class. Usually makes things more complicated and harder to understand the material. Worst prof ever had.1
During his lecture, he was basically just giving equations then the answer. He cannot explain anything.

He's nice if you go and talk to him in his office hours, but his definition of teaching is basically copying the exact same examples from the textbook. The $26 textbook for this class totally SUCKS by the way, I have to use other texts to understand what is going on. He uses a different prof's exams,  exam is a lot different from what he teaches.

I'm just wondering if he has ever come here to read student feedback for him. I have never rated any professor but today i have to because hes that bad. His first midterm exam was so confusing, time consuming... Didnt give many exercises. I did all the exercises in textbook but the exam was totally different. Too much calculating
hes so bad at teaching never take class with him otherwise  u gonna end up dropping the course if you dont want your grades suffering.

He can't teach or speak english and always behind on lectures so he included the content up to the class which was two days before the midterm. The class average for the first midterm which is the easiest for the course was 50%. His midterm is written as confusing as his english speaking ability. I would never sign up for another class he teaches.
Would try to stay for the whole lecture, always ended up leaving. Just so hard to understand what he was talking about that it was easier to teach myself from the textbook.

The lectures are so long and dull. Jorge always over explains in a convoluted manner, and goes off on long tangents about unrelated stuff outside of the scope of the course. For example, we were learning slope, essentially a basic math concept that should be easy to follow. He explained it in such a diluted way that no one understood what he said.
Lectures are so dull, but don't think you can get away with passing just by reading the text book. Final was not comparable to anything covered in class. He also wears really tacky sweaters

This prof is horrible. He can't speak English worth a damn, he does not come prepared for class, he gives credit questions on exam about him. Like "in this lecture Jorge said..."... I can't even understand him cause he cannot speak English and he is giving questions like that?
Don't take any class with him !!!! Useless lecture. Exam is difficult. Strong accent!  Making 100 level class more difficult and confused!
Just dont.

I attended his lectures at first but he doesn't make sense, his accent makes things unclear, and I usually end up leaving more confused than ever. He posts his notes (unclear as they are) online and the textbook makes things make sense so I'm never sitting through one of those lectures again. The material itself is relatively simple.

Hard to understand. Lectures feel like they go on forever. The only incentive to go to lecture is he puts bonus questions on exams about stuff he does in class. Lectures notes are pretty much straight from the textbook. That said, if you read the textbook and understand the concepts, it's the easiest class I've ever taken.

Avoid. Avoid. Avoid.  He spent 25 minutes during the first day of lecture teaching his students how to pronounce his name properly. The Lectures are always a lesson late, the TA's are practically invisible and you'll only come out of lecture just as confused as Jorge is. (he thought 0.01 is equivalent to 10%)

This person cannot even speak English and teaching statistics in university. In class people leave in the middle of class while he is talking, no one cares what he says and even when he ask silence no one does. He should not be teaching at all. He used MS paint to teach stats... He does not know what he is doing at all. Do not take this class.
Boring and wildy disorganized. He genuinely seems like w nice guy but damn, he's god awful as a teacher.   ive had 20+ profs so far. He is the worst prof if I had in terms of their ability to teach.

He is a nice guy; smiles most of the time.  However, he does a terrible job of communicating the course material to students.  He rarely finishes a complete sentence making you completely lost in the subject content.  Worst thing is he is exactly the same if you talk to him during office hours.  Unable to teach well leads to tough midtermsfinal

It should be a very easy course exclude the situation that you choose Jorge's STAT100!!!!!!!! He is really boring and prefers to give "surprising" bonus questions on all exams. This question may be "what unusual thing Jorge did in class?" Lecture notes are not helpful at all, if your GPA is really high,you can try this one>_<

Useless lectures where he just reads off book. Very unclear, slow, and boring, but lots of bonus qs on tests about things he does or says in class. Easy course but he has the ability to make it hard. Super low averages on exams

One of the worst guy who has no talents of teaching at all. The lectures were unacceptably disorganized. So just read the text. There were no need to attend his meaningless lectures unless you want earn some bonus marks at exams. He seems nice guy, but not a great teacher.

I really hate him!!!He has accent and its really hard to understand! What's more, he make strange question such as "What is the data from example in the text!". And the average is around 60% every midterm!

One of this prof's talent is to confuse you about what you already knew. He almost never finish a clear & logical sentence. His explanation of a concept is vague and disorganized. The notes on the course are really useless to understand the materials unless you read the text. To sum, he is a nice guy with terrible teaching skills.
He was super easy! I didn't like Stats but taking it with him went very well. Must take!

Class overall was pretty straightforward. 2 midterms and a final, with lots of bonus questions for extra marks in each one. Be sure to do lots of practice questions, prepares you for the exams. He's a really nice prof and tries to be funny which is nice.
